headline: Heidi O’Neill’s 2026 Arrival Tests Lululemon’s Next Growth Chapter
summary: Lululemon Athletica has appointed Heidi O’Neill as its next CEO. O’Neill is scheduled to take on the role in September 2026. She brings extensive leadership experience from senior roles at Nike. Lululemon Athletica, listed on NasdaqGS:LULU, is making this leadership change after a challenging share price period. headline: Why Lululemon (LULU) Stock Is Down Today
